scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@trail-pm/cli && npm run build --workspace=@trail-pm/ui
scripts.ui:prepare: npm run build --workspace=@trail-pm/cli && npm run build --workspace=@trail-pm/ui
scripts.ui:dev: npm run build --workspace=@trail-pm/cli && npm --prefix packages/ui run dev:all
scripts.trail-ui: npm run ui:prepare && npm --prefix packages/ui exec trail-ui
